View Vendor

{% if vendor %}
  • Name: {{ vendor.name }}
  • Abbreviation: {{ vendor.abbreviation }}
  • Tax ID Number: {{ vendor.tax_id_number }}
  • Active: {{ 'Yes' if vendor.is_active else 'No' }}
  • Type: {{ vendor.type }}
  • GUID: {{ vendor.guid }}
Edit Vendor
{% else %}
Vendor not found.
{% endif %}
